items.raw_excerpt: Helsingin kaupunki suunnittelee Östersundomiin uusia asuin- työpaikka- ja luonnonsuojelualueita. Alueen osayleiskaavan luonnos perustuu laajoihin selvityksiin.
items.summary_en: Helsinki is planning new homes, jobs, and nature protection areas in Ostersundom. The draft local plan is based on wide studies and can be commented on until the end of October.
items.summary_ko: 헬싱키시는 외스테르순돔에 새 주거지, 일자리 공간, 자연보호구역을 계획하고 있다. 이 지역의 부분 종합계획 초안은 폭넓은 조사에 기반하며, 10월 말까지 의견을 낼 수 있다.
items.title_en: Helsinki Plans a Nature-Friendly Rail Town in Ostersundom

items.raw_excerpt: The iconic pine on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli National Park has died.
items.summary_en: A well-known pine tree on Mäkrävaara hill in Koli National Park has died. The tree was an iconic local landmark in eastern Finland.

items.raw_excerpt: Kerala News:Vadakkunnathan temple wins UNESCO award
items.summary_en: Vadakkunnathan Temple in Kerala has won a UNESCO award. The award recognizes the temple and brings attention to local heritage in Thrissur.

items.raw_excerpt: While investigating allegations of corruption at Calgary city hall, police say they uncovered text messages sent by former councillor Sean Chu to a man now accused of offering money for council votes in which Chu said to “keep conversations to his personal phone” because his work phone was “subject to Freedom of Information” disclosure.
items.summary_en: Calgary police found text messages from former councillor Sean Chu during a corruption investigation. Chu told a man to keep talks on personal phones because his work phone could be checked under freedom of information rules. The messages are part of a probe into allegations of bribery at city hall.
items.summary_ko: 캘거리 경찰이 시청 부패 수사 과정에서 전직 시의원 션 추의 문자메시지를 발견했다. 추는 업무용 전화가 정보공개 대상이므로 개인 전화로 대화하라고 지시한 것으로 드러났다. 이 메시지는 시의원 표 매수 의혹을 조사하는 수사 일부다.
items.title_en: Ex-Calgary councillor told man to use personal phone to avoid FOI checks
items.title_ko: 전 캘거리 시의원, FOI 회피 위해 개인폰 사용 지시
items.title_original: Ex-Calgary councillor directed use of personal phone over freedom of information concerns: docs

items.raw_excerpt: La compagnie Brittany Ferries, partenaire majeur exclusif de l’escale de la course La Solitaire du Figaro Paprec à Roscoff, proposera de nombreuses animations avec ses équipes navigantes et sédentaires, du 10 au 14 septembre 2025 dans le village installé pour le grand public
items.summary_en: Brittany Ferries will run several public activities at the Solitaire du Figaro Paprec race village in Roscoff. Crew members and office teams will take part from September 10 to 14, 2025.
items.summary_ko: 브리타니 페리는 로스코프에 마련된 솔리테르 뒤 피가로 파프렉 경주 마을에서 여러 공개 행사를 운영한다. 승선 직원과 사무 직원들이 2025년 9월 10일부터 14일까지 함께 참여한다.
items.title_en: Brittany Ferries brings activities to Roscoff race village
items.title_ko: 브리타니 페리, 로스코프 경주 마을에서 행사 운영

items.raw_excerpt: Panadería Rosetta in Mexico City was awarded as one of the world’s standout pastry destinations by a prestigious Paris‑based dining guide.
items.summary_en: Panaderia Rosetta in Mexico City won a respected pastry award from a Paris-based dining guide. The Roma Norte bakery was named one of the world's standout pastry spots.
items.summary_ko: 멕시코시티의 파나데리아 로세타가 파리 기반의 권위 있는 미식 안내서에서 페이스트리 상을 받았다. 로마 노르테에 있는 이 빵집은 세계에서 눈에 띄는 페이스트리 명소 중 하나로 선정됐다.

items.raw_excerpt: Team Germany fans bought up so many replica World Cup jerseys that sportswear giant Adidas said it briefly ran out of the letter 'V'.
items.summary_en: Germany fans bought many replica World Cup shirts. Adidas said it briefly ran out of the letter V because so many names needed it.
items.summary_ko: 독일 팬들이 월드컵 복제 유니폼을 많이 사들였습니다. 아디다스는 이름 마킹에 쓰이는 글자 V가 너무 많이 필요해 한때 재고가 떨어졌다고 밝혔습니다.

items.raw_excerpt: If you've been busy with work, or stressed with life, then it sounds like you might be in need of some of today's Danish word.
items.summary_en: The Danish word of the day is "alenetid." It may fit people who are busy with work or stressed by life. The word points to needing time alone.
items.summary_ko: 오늘의 덴마크어는 "알레네티드"다. 일이 바쁘거나 삶에 지친 사람에게 어울리는 말이다. 혼자만의 시간이 필요하다는 뜻을 담고 있다.
items.title_en: Danish Word of the Day: Alenetid
items.title_ko: 오늘의 덴마크어: 알레네티드

items.raw_excerpt: Dietro (e davanti) le quinte del Mic di Faenza
items.summary_en: The MIC in Faenza was born as a small local museum and became a world-class institution. It holds 60,000 ceramic works, runs top restoration labs, and offers programs for citizen well-being. A current exhibition tells the history of drinking vessels from ancient times to today.
items.summary_ko: 파엔차의 국제 도자기 박물관(MIC)은 작은 지역 박물관으로 시작해 세계적 수준으로 성장했다. 6만 점의 도자기 소장품, 최고 수준의 복원 연구실, 시민의 신체적·정신적 건강을 위한 프로그램을 갖추고 있다. 현재 진행 중인 전시는 고대부터 현대까지 음주 문화의 역사를 조명한다.
items.title_en: Behind the scenes of the ceramics museum in Faenza
items.title_ko: 파엔차 도자기 박물관의 숨은 이야기
items.title_original: Dietro (e davanti) le quinte del Mic di Faenza - Il Giornale dell'Arte

items.raw_excerpt: This quaint, waterfront village in Ontario is just the place to hit the brakes and relax. Here’s what to know about Lakefield.
items.summary_en: Lakefield is a small waterfront village in Ontario. It has a historic downtown and scenic winding roads nearby. The village is presented as a calm place to slow down and relax.

items.summary_en: France 3 lists local April Fools' jokes from Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes. The jokes include an anti-dinosaur order, Céline Dion coming to a small town, and local wine flowing from taps.

items.raw_excerpt: Today's word is, unfortunately, a not uncommon part of Swedish summer.
items.summary_en: The Local Sweden looks at the Swedish word “regna,” which means to rain. The word fits Swedish summer, when rain is a common part of the season.
items.summary_ko: The Local Sweden이 스웨덴어 단어 “regna”를 소개했다. 이 단어는 비가 오다는 뜻으로, 비가 자주 오는 스웨덴의 여름과 잘 맞는다.
